label: Product line
heading: Two glass variations
description: Whether your customers want crystal clarity or total privacy, Eagle Glass delivers - with the same premium quality in every protector.

products.name: Premium Glass
products.description: Crystal-clear 9H tempered glass with anti-fingerprint coating for flawless daily protection.

products.name: Privacy Glass
